summary: Iteration 11: Comprehensive testing of new council features - yard-only creation, formation threshold (80%), and escalation voting system. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features including yard-only create button, street/house_number fields, formation bar, escalation tab with initiate/vote UI, and ProfilePage address form.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/councils/levels - Returns level hierarchy with parent_level info (yard->district->city->republic->country)
BACKEND: POST /api/councils - Requires authentication (401)
BACKEND: POST /api/councils - Rejects if legal_consent is false
BACKEND: POST /api/councils - Requires street + house_number
BACKEND: POST /api/councils - Only creates yard level (ignores level field)
BACKEND: POST /api/councils - Rejects duplicate address (same street + house_number)
BACKEND: GET /api/councils/{id}/formation - Returns formation percentage for yard councils
BACKEND: GET /api/councils/{id}/formation - Returns 100% for non-yard councils
BACKEND: GET /api/councils/{id}/formation - Returns 404 for non-existent council
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/confirm - Requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/confirm - Requires verification level 2+
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/join - Requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/join - Joins council successfully
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/discussions - Requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/discussions - Requires membership
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/news - Requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/news - Requires chairman/rep role, includes AI check
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/escalation - Requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/escalation - Requires chairman/rep role
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/{id}/escalation - Requires confirmed+formed council (80%)
BACKEND: GET /api/councils/escalations/active - Lists active escalation votes
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/escalations/{eid}/vote - Requires authentication
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/escalations/{eid}/vote - Requires chairman/rep of eligible council
BACKEND: POST /api/councils/escalations/{eid}/vote - Returns 404 for non-existent escalation
BACKEND: Existing council_766c80223222 is yard level, active, 100% formed
BACKEND: Existing council_0c4b7a580b9d is yard level
BACKEND: Existing council_0a5d54fc20a6 is district level, formed via escalation
BACKEND: GET /api/councils - Lists all councils
BACKEND: GET /api/councils?level=yard - Filters by level
BACKEND: GET /api/councils?status=active - Filters by status
FRONTEND: CouncilsPage loads with 'Народные Советы' title
FRONTEND: 'Создать двор' button (yard-only creation, no level selector)
FRONTEND: Level filters visible (Все, Дворовый, Районный, Городской, Республиканский, Народный)
FRONTEND: Create modal titled 'Создать дворовый совет'
FRONTEND: Create modal has street + house_number fields (Улица *, Номер дома *)
FRONTEND: Create modal has district + city fields (Район, Город)
FRONTEND: Create modal has legal consent checkbox
FRONTEND: Council detail shows formation bar (Формирование: 5/5 жителей 100% Сформирован)
FRONTEND: Council detail has Escalation tab (Эскалация)
FRONTEND: Escalation tab has 'Инициировать Районный совет' button
FRONTEND: Escalation modal titled 'Создать Районный совет'
FRONTEND: Escalation modal has name, district, city fields
FRONTEND: ProfilePage has 'Адрес проживания' section
FRONTEND: ProfilePage address form has street, house_number, district, city fields
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed seed_data duplicate key error - referral_code unique index was causing startup failure when updating multiple users with same generated code
Council creation correctly enforces yard-only level
Formation threshold (80%) correctly calculated based on verified residents at same address
Escalation voting system working - chairman/rep can initiate, eligible councils can vote, majority creates next-level council
District council (council_0a5d54fc20a6) was successfully formed via escalation voting
seed_data_creation: Used existing test councils and users. council_766c80223222 is 100% formed (5/5 verified residents)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested the new council hierarchy system: only yard councils can be created manually, higher levels (district, city, republic, country) form through escalation voting. Formation threshold is 80% of verified residents at the same address. Test data includes: council_766c80223222 (yard, 100% formed, active), council_0c4b7a580b9d (yard, active), council_0a5d54fc20a6 (district, formed via escalation). User1 (WRANhsgZEBRoK2GSyIUvBEaqIWo0YtmhTsICy2Y4cPc) is chairman of council_766c80223222 at address Ленина 15. ProfilePage now has AddressForm component for setting street, house_number, district, city.

formation_system.threshold: 80% of verified residents at same address

frontend_components.councils_page: Yard-only create button, level filters, formation bar
frontend_components.profile_page: AddressForm with street, house_number, district, city
